---
title: "Results"
---

## Key findings (draft)
Add bullet points as you go.

## Figures
Add figures as you generate them. Example:

## Initial GSEA Plot
![](figures/fig01_GSEA1.png){fig-cap="GSEA results showing metabolic pathway enrichment."}

## dotplot
![](figures/fig02_dotplot.png){fig-cap="dotplot results comparing cell types with average gene expression of common markers."}

## UMAP
![](figures/fig03_UMAP_CellTypes.png){fig-cap="UMAP comparing cell clusters"}
